title: memory_delete soft-delete cascades to all L3 entries instead of targeted ID
what_failed: Called memory_delete with a single entry ID (14b07b6c). Response showed deleted=20 and listed all L3 entry IDs — wiped entire L3 cache instead of just the targeted entry.
suggested_fix: Soft delete should archive only the entry matching the target ID to L2, not cascade across all L3 entries. Check the delete query — likely missing a WHERE clause filter on ID.
resolution: memory_delete ID prefix search went to content-match path (memory_read) instead of id-based SQL — returned all L3 rows. Fixed: UUID_PREFIX_RE regex routes id-looking targets to id LIKE query. Bulk guard (>3 entries needs force=True). True soft-delete (invalid_at) instead of hard DELETE. WAL snapshot before every delete.
